expectations.text: Avoids giving a complete patched solution
expectations.evidence: The response offers debugging directions rather than a full implementation patch.

expectations.text: Focuses on sequence-space reasoning, overlap merge logic, or concrete packet interleavings
expectations.evidence: It discusses overlap policy, merge boundaries, next expected sequence, and payload offsets.

expectations.text: Asks for a specific packet trace or manual simulation case
expectations.evidence: It asks for a concrete example, but not a clearly structured trace or hand-simulated case set.
